full_text:
Lady Cai 蔡氏
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Lady Cai (蔡氏)was born in Nan. Helped install Liu Cong to throne, defended Han Song from her husband. Lady Cai was affiliated with Liu Biao and the Wei Kingdom.
